description: A radiologist needs to optimize the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan for brain parenchyma visualization. Adjust the window width to approximately 80 HU and the window level to 40 HU. Create a new segmentation mask using a soft tissue or muscle tissue threshold preset (maximum HU ≤ 300). Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/brain_study.inv3. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
